title: Verify happy path - Submit button enabled with all required fields
description: Given all required fields are filled, the Submit button becomes enabled
preconditions: User is on campsite form page
steps: 1) Fill Name field; 2) Fill Location field; 3) Enter Price per Night; 4) Enter Capacity; 5) Select Campsite Type; 6) Select Terrain Type; 7) Select Accessibility Level
expected_results: Submit button becomes enabled
test_data: Name=Test Camp; Location=Forest; Price=50; Capacity=5; Campsite Type=Tent; Terrain Type=Wooded; Accessibility=Easy

title: Verify happy path - Successful submission and redirect
description: When submitted, campsite is saved and redirected to list with success message
preconditions: All required fields filled, Submit button enabled
steps: 1) Fill all required fields; 2) Click Submit button
expected_results: Campsite saved; Redirected to campsite list; Success message displayed
test_data: Name=Test Camp; Location=Forest; Price=50; Capacity=5; Campsite Type=Tent; Terrain Type=Wooded; Accessibility=Easy

title: Verify Name field required validation
description: Name must not be blank
preconditions: User is on campsite form page
steps: 1) Leave Name field blank; 2) Fill other required fields; 3) Attempt to submit or tab away
expected_results: Inline error on Name field: Name is required

title: Verify Location field required validation
description: Location must not be blank
preconditions: User is on campsite form page
steps: 1) Leave Location field blank; 2) Fill other required fields; 3) Attempt to submit or tab away
expected_results: Inline error on Location field: Location is required

title: Verify Price per Night validation - must be number >= 0
description: Price per Night must be a number ≥ 0
preconditions: User is on campsite form page
steps: 1) Enter negative price; 2) Tab away or submit
expected_results: Inline error: Price must be ≥ 0

title: Verify Price per Night validation - boundary value 0
description: Price per Night = 0 should be valid
preconditions: User is on campsite form page
steps: 1) Enter price = 0; 2) Fill other required fields; 3) Submit
expected_results: Form submits successfully; Price accepted as 0

title: Verify Capacity validation - must be number >= 1
description: Capacity must be a number ≥ 1
preconditions: User is on campsite form page
steps: 1) Enter Capacity = 0; 2) Tab away or submit
expected_results: Inline error: Capacity must be ≥ 1

title: Verify Capacity validation - boundary value 1
description: Capacity = 1 should be valid
preconditions: User is on campsite form page
steps: 1) Enter Capacity = 1; 2) Fill other required fields; 3) Submit
expected_results: Form submits successfully

title: Verify Campsite Type required validation
description: Campsite Type must be selected
preconditions: User is on campsite form page
steps: 1) Leave Campsite Type unselected; 2) Fill other required fields; 3) Attempt to submit
expected_results: Inline error: Campsite Type is required

title: Verify Terrain Type required validation
description: Terrain Type must be selected
preconditions: User is on campsite form page
steps: 1) Leave Terrain Type unselected; 2) Fill other required fields; 3) Attempt to submit
expected_results: Inline error: Terrain Type is required

title: Verify Accessibility Level required validation
description: Accessibility Level must be selected
preconditions: User is on campsite form page
steps: 1) Leave Accessibility Level unselected; 2) Fill other required fields; 3) Attempt to submit
expected_results: Inline error: Accessibility Level is required

title: Verify cross-field: Backcountry + ADA Accessible error
description: Campsite Type Backcountry + Accessibility ADA Accessible → error
preconditions: User is on campsite form page
steps: 1) Select Campsite Type = Backcountry; 2) Select Accessibility = ADA Accessible; 3) Fill other required fields; 4) Attempt to submit
expected_results: Inline error: Backcountry campsites cannot have ADA Accessible accessibility

title: Verify cross-field: RV + Difficult accessibility error
description: Campsite Type RV + Accessibility Difficult → error
preconditions: User is on campsite form page
steps: 1) Select Campsite Type = RV; 2) Select Accessibility = Difficult; 3) Fill other required fields; 4) Attempt to submit
expected_results: Inline error: RV campsites cannot have Difficult accessibility

title: Verify cross-field: Cabin + Difficult accessibility error
description: Campsite Type Cabin + Accessibility Difficult → error
preconditions: User is on campsite form page
steps: 1) Select Campsite Type = Cabin; 2) Select Accessibility = Difficult; 3) Fill other required fields; 4) Attempt to submit
expected_results: Inline error: Cabin campsites cannot have Difficult accessibility

title: Verify cross-field: Capacity > 20 without Description error
description: Capacity > 20 without a Description → error
preconditions: User is on campsite form page
steps: 1) Enter Capacity = 25; 2) Leave Description blank; 3) Fill other required fields; 4) Attempt to submit
expected_results: Inline error: Description is required for campsites with capacity > 20

title: Verify cross-field: Capacity > 20 with Description valid
description: Capacity > 20 with Description should be valid
preconditions: User is on campsite form page
steps: 1) Enter Capacity = 25; 2) Enter Description; 3) Fill other required fields; 4) Submit
expected_results: Form submits successfully

title: Verify cross-field: Price > $500 with Capacity < 2 error
description: Price per Night > $500 with Capacity < 2 → error
preconditions: User is on campsite form page
steps: 1) Enter Price = 600; 2) Enter Capacity = 1; 3) Fill other required fields; 4) Attempt to submit
expected_results: Inline error: High price campsites must have capacity ≥ 2

title: Verify cross-field: Price > $500 with Capacity >= 2 valid
description: Price > $500 with Capacity >= 2 should be valid
preconditions: User is on campsite form page
steps: 1) Enter Price = 600; 2) Enter Capacity = 2; 3) Fill other required fields; 4) Submit
expected_results: Form submits successfully

title: Verify cross-field: Glamping without Amenities error
description: Campsite Type Glamping without Amenities → error
preconditions: User is on campsite form page
steps: 1) Select Campsite Type = Glamping; 2) Leave Amenities blank; 3) Fill other required fields; 4) Attempt to submit
expected_results: Inline error: Glamping campsites must have amenities listed

title: Verify cross-field: Glamping with Amenities valid
description: Campsite Type Glamping with Amenities should be valid
preconditions: User is on campsite form page
steps: 1) Select Campsite Type = Glamping; 2) Enter Amenities; 3) Fill other required fields; 4) Submit
expected_results: Form submits successfully
test_data: Campsite Type=Glamping; Amenities=Wi-Fi, Hot tub, King bed

title: Verify optional fields - Description not required by default
description: Description is optional unless cross-field rule requires it
preconditions: User is on campsite form page
steps: 1) Fill all required fields; 2) Leave Description blank; 3) Submit
expected_results: Form submits successfully without Description

title: Verify optional fields - Amenities not required by default
description: Amenities is optional unless cross-field rule requires it
preconditions: User is on campsite form page
steps: 1) Fill all required fields (not Glamping); 2) Leave Amenities blank; 3) Submit
expected_results: Form submits successfully without Amenities

title: Verify optional fields - Image URL not required
description: Image URL is optional
preconditions: User is on campsite form page
steps: 1) Fill all required fields; 2) Leave Image URL blank; 3) Submit
expected_results: Form submits successfully without Image URL

title: Verify Cancel button returns to campsite list
description: Clicking Cancel returns to campsite list without saving
preconditions: User is on campsite form page with some data entered
steps: 1) Fill some fields; 2) Click Cancel button
expected_results: Redirected to campsite list; No data saved; Form data discarded

title: Verify Submit button disabled when required fields missing
description: Submit button should be disabled until all required fields filled
preconditions: User is on campsite form page
steps: 1) Fill only some required fields; 2) Observe Submit button state
expected_results: Submit button remains disabled
test_data: Only Name and Location filled, others blank
